svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: School and childcare floor care: the four jobs
svg.desc: The four floor-care services that win school and childcare contracts, each with its compliance anchor: carpet cleaning for occupied rooms (child-safe low-tox products, ventilation, isolate and sign damp floors); tile and grout cleaning (confirm slip resistance under AS 4663 after cleaning); vinyl strip and seal (SDS-led PPE, ventilation, physical isolation; cure and re-entry from the SDS/TDS; re-verify slip resistance to the target class under AS 4663); pressure washing with run-off control (the drain is just for rain; trade-waste approval before discharge to sewer). Foundations for every job: current SDS, chemicals register, correct labels including decanted containers, heavy work scheduled into term breaks.
svg.text: CARSI · FLOOR CARE FOR SCHOOLS & CHILDCARE
The four jobs that win the work
Each service paired with the compliance a school or childcare contract assumes you know.

g.text: Carpet cleaning — occupied rooms
Hot water extraction for deep soil when there is a drying window;
low-moisture encapsulation when the room must reopen fast.
Child-safe, low-tox products · dilute per the label · ventilate ·
isolate and sign damp floors. Never promise a fixed dry time.
Tile & grout cleaning
Pre-wet, apply, dwell to the label, agitate, rinse, recover.
Residue that dries on the floor dulls it and holds new soil.
After cleaning, confirm the in-service floor’s slip resistance
against the site’s target class under AS 4663.
Vinyl strip & seal — the high-risk job
Caustic strippers burn skin and eyes: SDS-led PPE, ventilation
and spill control — and physical isolation, not a sign alone.
Cure & re-entry come from the SDS/TDS, not guesswork — then
re-verify slip resistance to the target class (AS 4663).
Pressure washing — with run-off control
Wash water carries detergents, grit and grease. Confine the zone,
cover stormwater pits, and recover the water — never let it run.
“The drain is just for rain” — trade-waste approval is required
before any discharge to sewer. Ask the water authority early.

svg.text: BEFORE ANY JOB — WHAT EVERY CONTRACT ASSUMES
Current SDS for every chemical (reviewed within 5 years) · a maintained chemicals register ·
correct labels, including decanted containers · heavy work scheduled into term breaks.
This training supports your judgement — it does not replace Safety Data Sheets, manufacturer technical data,
Australian Standards or your own qualified assessment of each site.
From the CARSI course “Commercial Floor Care for Schools & Childcare Contracts” · carsi.com.au
